sources.title: Algebraic Fractions Mini Source
sources.note: Original demo content bundled with cathygo-learning.

curriculum_excerpts.text: An algebraic fraction has a denominator that contains a variable.
Before simplifying or solving, the original denominator cannot be zero.

exercises.stem: Which values must be excluded before simplifying an algebraic fraction?
exercises.answer: Values that make the original denominator zero.

exercises.stem: Why is canceling matching letters not always valid in an algebraic fraction?
exercises.answer: Only complete common factors may be canceled.

common_errors.error: Canceling matching letters that are not complete factors.
common_errors.fix: Factor numerator and denominator first, then cancel only complete common factors.
